name: Alex Balats
tagline: MEng Computer Science at Durham University · AI / Systems / Agentic Networks
about: Im a MEng Computer Science student at Durham University building agentic AI systems and intelligent tooling. My work focuses on bridging machine learning, systems engineering, and real-world deployment  from multi-agent optimisation to computer vision pipelines. Im interested in roles where software engineering and applied AI meet.

projects.title: CounterTime

projects.description: AI-powered financial analysis system for market intelligence and trading insights.

projects.title: AWS Agentic Networks Hackathon
